intro: Scypharia guayaquilensis is a species of mushroom that belongs to the family Phallaceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of South America. The health benefits of Scypharia guayaquilensis include its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpene derivatives, specifically scyphariolides A and B, which are responsible for its bioactive properties. Traditional herbal preparations made from Scypharia guayaquilensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal benefits in the treatment of various health conditions.
